content:
BCI stack is forming:
• Science Corp ($230M) = implant commercialization
• Neurosoft = undercapitalized infra layer
• Gestala = non-invasive ultrasound

This is a standards stack in public.

Building an autonomous agent OS that runs itself. Zero babysitting. Zero prompts. Just execution.

EVEZ OS: Self-improving cognition loop.

The best AI agent isn't the smartest. It's the one that keeps running when you're asleep.

EVEZ: The daemon that never stops.
